business.name: Lotus Unisex Salon Sec.95
business.tagline: Luxury hair, beauty and bridal experiences for Gurgaon.
business.address: Meoka Road, Near AWHO Society, Sector 95, Gurugram, Haryana 122505

faq.question: What are your opening hours?
faq.answer: We are open daily till 9 PM.

faq.question: Do I need an appointment?
faq.answer: Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are recommended for premium services and bridal bookings.

faq.question: Do you offer bridal services?
faq.answer: Yes. We specialize in bridal makeup, bridal hairstyles, skin prep and pre-wedding beauty rituals.

faq.question: Which clients usually visit Lotus?
faq.answer: We welcome women, brides, professionals and anyone looking for a relaxing, luxury salon experience in Gurgaon.

instagramPosts.caption: Bridal glam with a soft, luminous Lotus finish.
Texture-focused styling with polished detail and hold.
A warm welcome framed by clean lines and elevated calm.
The people behind every confident transformation.

services.name: Signature Hair Styling
services.description: Precision styling, polished waves, event blowouts and modern finishing tailored to your face shape.

services.name: Global Hair Coloring
services.description: Dimensional shades, gloss treatments and rich tone balancing for a luxurious color result.

services.name: Restorative Hair Spa
services.description: A deep nourishment ritual to calm frizz, restore shine and leave hair touchably soft.

services.name: Advanced Hair Treatment
services.description: Consultation-led repair and smoothening support for stressed, dry or chemically treated hair.

services.name: HD Makeup Artistry
services.description: Camera-ready, skin-like makeup with premium products and long-wear finesse.

services.name: Microblading
services.description: Natural-looking brow definition shaped to enhance your facial structure.

services.name: Permanent Eyelash Extensions
services.description: Classic to volume lash sets that add lift, softness and everyday elegance.

services.name: Skin Glow Therapy
services.description: Targeted skin care rituals designed for brightness, hydration and visible freshness.

services.name: Luxury Manicure & Nails
services.description: Elegant grooming, glossy finishes and clean nail detailing in a premium setting.

services.name: Bridal Makeup Signature
services.description: Wedding-day artistry with skin prep, lashes, draping assistance and a lasting luxe finish.

services.name: Bridal Hair Styling
services.description: Statement buns, braids and soft volumes designed for ceremonies, portraits and receptions.

reviews.text: Clean setup, courteous service and a confidence-boosting final look. I will absolutely return.
